headline: If You Invested $1,000 In Amazon Stock When Amazon Prime Was Launched, Here's How Much You'd Have Now
summary: One of the most successful retailers and ecommerce companies of all time is Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN). The company went public in 1997 and survived the dot-com boom that wiped out the valuations and existence of many ecommerce and internet companies of the 1990s.

headline: Tesla Updates Supercharger Map With New Upcoming Stations, 35% Growth In 2021
summary: Elon Musk owned Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) has recently launched its updated Supercharger map

headline: The Dogecoin Millionaire Reveals What He's Bullish On, And Elon Musk Is Too!
summary: Glauber Contessoto — who became widely known as the Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) millionaire after making a fortune by trading the memecoin — revealed another asset that he is bullish on, and we can guarantee that it is not what you'd expect.

headline: Why This Apple Expert Thinks App Store Can Survive Legislative And Regulatory Challenges
summary: Apple, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) App Store has been in the eye of the storm for quite some time now, with developers taking up cudgels against the company for fleecing them off a fair share of what is due to them.

headline: Here's The Latest Offer Being Made To The Teen Who Wants $50K To Stop Tracking Elon Musk's Jet
summary: Jack Sweeney, the 19-year-old whose Twitter account tracks Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk's private jet, has rejected the latest offer to delete the account.

headline: 'Jackass Forever' Tops The US Box Office With $23.5M; 'Moonfall' Follows At $10M
summary: Johnny Knoxville and his knockabout henchmen took over the U.S. weekend box office with “Jackass Forever,” bringing in $23.5 million from 3,604 theaters.

headline: Shiba Inu Edges Out Bitcoin, Becomes The Most Popular Crypto On CoinMarketCap In January
summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) may not have had a rip-roaring January to show, but the dog-themed currency has remained the favorite among digital currencies.

headline: Dogecoin Does It Again, Hits Yet Another Major Milestone
summary: What a day for Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE). The meme coin’s official Twitter account now has over three million followers.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (Feb. 6-12): Pfizer, AstraZeneca Earnings, Conference Presentations, IPOs And More
summary: Biotech stocks managed to close the week ending Feb. 4 with gains. Stocks recovered along with the broader markets early in the week, but came under pressure midweek amid negative reaction to some big pharma earnings. The sector came back up in the final session for a firm finish.
